title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 376.1042 - Marketing by agent, agency or broker violation of law
text:
376.1042.  Marketing by agent, agency or broker violation of law. — The sale, solicitation or marketing of any plan in violation of section 376.1040 by an agent, agency or broker shall constitute a violation of section 375.141.
(L. 1993 H.B. 709 § 39, A.L. 2019 S.B. 514)
